text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 125 

GAP_INPP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy within a 
split network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit.
